exploreUrl:
<js>
eval(String(source.bookSourceComment))
fenl=[
{"title": "首页",  "url": "https://onehu.xyz<,/page/{{page}}/#board>",  "style":{"layout_flexGrow": 0,  layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45}},
{"title": "分类",  "url": "https://onehu.xyz/categories/",  "style":{"layout_flexGrow": 0,  layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45}}
]
b=name
for (i in b){
	x=String(b[i]);
url="https://onehu.xyz/categories/"+x+"/<,page/{{page}}/#board>";
 fenl.push({title: x,url: url,style: {
		layout_flexGrow: 1,
		layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.5	}})
}

JSON.stringify(fenl)
</js>
